encounter.reason: New patient wellness, incomplete MMR series noted
encounter.service_provider: UW Health University Student Health Services
encounter.location: UW Health University Student Health Services, Madison, WI

conditions.name: incomplete immunization status — incomplete MMR vaccination series
conditions.note: Single MMR dose at 12 months (June 2005), missing recommended second dose. Documented as incomplete MMR series — consider catch-up. Not flagged for immediate follow-up action at this visit.

conditions.name: seasonal allergic rhinitis
conditions.note: Pre-existing, mild. Newly documented at this encounter. Well controlled with OTC loratadine as needed.

medications.name: loratadine 10 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take 1 tablet by mouth once daily as needed for seasonal allergy symptoms

document_references.description: New patient comprehensive wellness visit for a 19-year-old healthy male enrolling at UW-Madison. Includes complete review of systems, physical exam findings, vitals, PHQ-2 screening (negative), documentation of incomplete MMR series from childhood, seasonal allergic rhinitis, NKDA status, and plan for routine follow-up.

Written instructions provided to new student regarding campus health resources, including how to schedule appointments, after-hours care options, and mental health services available through UW Health University Student Health Services.
